audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. get_beacon_proposer_indices internally constrains selection to get_active_validator_indices(next_epoch), which only includes validators where is_active_at(next_epoch) returns true. Exit epochs are guaranteed to be at least current_epoch + max_seed_lookahead (4) + 1 in the future, while lookahead only predicts up to current_epoch + min_seed_lookahead (1) + 1, ensuring all selected proposers remain active for their assigned epochs.
